legislation.title: Power for the People Act of 2026
legislation.summary: A bill to promote the creation of data center load queues and data center-specific rate classes to mitigate the impact of data centers on other electricity consumers, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: VET Artificial Intelligence Act Validation and Evaluation for Trustworthy (VET) Artificial Intelligence Act
legislation.summary: A bill to require the Director of the National Institute of Standards and Technology to develop voluntary guidelines and specifications for internal and external assurances of artificial intelligence systems, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: Stop Identity Fraud and Identity Theft Act of 2026
legislation.summary: To establish a government-wide approach to stopping identity fraud and theft in the financial services industry, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: Facial Recognition Act of 2025
legislation.summary: To regulate law enforcement use of facial recognition technology, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: Data Center Water and Energy Transparency Act of 2026
legislation.summary: A bill to require data center operators to submit to States or the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency and the Secretaries of Energy and Agriculture reports on data center energy and water use, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: GRID Act Guaranteeing Rate Insulation from Data Centers Act
legislation.summary: A bill to impose certain requirements on data centers to ensure the prioritization of residential ratepayers, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: Data Center Community Impact Act
legislation.summary: To require the Secretary of Energy to conduct a study on the effect of data centers on communities of color and low-income communities, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: No Harm Data Centers Act
legislation.summary: To ensure that American families are protected from the impacts of data centers on the electric grid, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: Data Center Transparency Act
legislation.summary: To require reports on the effects of data centers on air quality and water quality, and on electricity consumption by data centers.

legislation.title: New Essential Education Discoveries Act of 2025
legislation.summary: To amend the Education Sciences Reform Act of 2002 to establish a National Center for Advanced Development in Education at the Institute for Education Sciences, and for other purposes.

legislation.title: Protect American AI Act of 2026
legislation.summary: To limit the effect of litigation on the environmental application process for data centers and associated infrastructure.

legislation.title: Wildfire Intelligence Collaboration and Coordination Act of 2025
legislation.summary: A bill to establish a Wildfire Intelligence Center, and for other purposes.
